data.body: Plan-review round-3 advisory triage: the finding asking for a live-model inference AC (prove the new rubric text fires on R-non-gating-skip / R-fault-wrong-seam and stays silent on the FP cases) is judged INVALID AS SCOPED and not adopted. Rationale: the repo's eval runner (rebar prompt eval) is offline validate+summarize only — there is no live-inference harness in the CLI or CI; the established convention for standing eval specs (story f93a) is strict offline validation in CI plus separate, billable experiment runs outside the commit gate. Adding a live-inference AC would make the ticket unclosable in CI. The offline validation AC (validate_eval_spec strict over the four new cases) is retained; a live experiment run remains available as the documented follow-on outside this ticket.
